stemHtml: Which statement about parallel approaches is correct?

options.a: In dependent parallel approaches, radar separation is applied with a minimum distance of 5 NM between aircraft on adjacent localizers.
options.b: In independent parallel approaches, radar separation is not applied; instead a No Transgression Zone (NTZ) is established between the localizer centrelines.
options.c: In independent parallel approaches, radar separation is applied with a minimum distance of 2 NM between aircraft on adjacent localizers.
options.d: In dependent parallel approaches, radar separation is not applied; instead a Normal Operating Zone (NOZ) is established between the localizer centrelines.
